words.def: the condition of belonging to a particular place or group by virtue of social or ethnic or cultural lineage
words.zh: n. 鄉土感情, 歸根之情

words.def: (botany) the usually underground organ that lacks buds or leaves or nodes; absorbs water and mineral salts; usually it anchors the plant to the ground
words.zh: n. 根, 根本, 根源, 基礎, 底部

words.def: a category of things distinguished by some common characteristic or quality
words.zh: n. 種類, 方式, 品質, 態度, 舉止

words.def: to a degree exceeding normal or proper limits
words.zh: adv. 也, 非常, 太

words.def: a state of decay usually accompanied by an offensive odor
words.zh: n. 腐爛, 腐蝕, 敗壞
